creator: lkoeller@cc.fh-lippe.de
text:
New port of grace-5.0.1 the successor of xmgr.
	This port requires fftw a Fast Fourier Transform Library and
	pdflib a library to generate PDF documents from C-Progs, Perl,
	Python, and tcl.

Fix: 

Test and commit the ports! I try to follow the last ports
	guidlines as close as possible.

	The correct install of the fftw makeinfo files runs only with
	the makeinfo command included into the texinfo-3.12 distribution.
	I send an PR for this change request, to the texinfo distribution
	included into the basesystem, too.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Get the ports from

	ftp://ftp.uni-bielefeld.de/pub/systems/FreeBSD/lkoeller/

	They are named

		fftw-2.0.1-port.tar.gz
		pdflib-0.6-port.tar.gz
		grace-5.0.1-port.tar.gz
